claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled native text entry is paired with named tag removal buttons and repeated hidden form values.
semantics.rolePolicy: Entry, removal, validation, serialization, disabled, and read-only state remain baseline; duplicate recovery output and focus behavior are absent when disabled.

keyboard.key: Enter or a configured single-key delimiter
keyboard.behavior: Adds a non-empty, valid, unique tag.
Removes the last tag when editable.
Moves through native entry, optional reorder controls, and remove controls.

nonColor: Tag text, borders, remove names, and recovery text accompany color.
responsive: Tokens wrap and the entry reflows using logical properties on narrow and RTL layouts.
consumerResponsibilities: Validate tag syntax and authorization server-side.
Localize messages and set a suitable maximum.
Choose delimiters that do not conflict with expected tag content and provide a localized validateTag recovery message.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
